sourceRef.citation: Fatima Zahra El Amrani et al. 2026

statement.en: Micro-Sprinkler Irrigation Efficacy: A Meta-Analysis of Water Productivity and Salinity Mitigation for Date Palm Smallholders in the Draa Valley, Morocco
statement.summary: { "background": "In arid regions such as the Draa Valley, date palm cultivation faces severe challenges from water scarcity and soil salinisation. Traditional flood irrigation methods are inefficient and exacerbate salinity, threatening smallholder livelihoods. Micro-sprinkler irrigation is promoted as a water-saving alternative, but its aggregated efficacy for this specific agro-ecological context lacks comprehensive synthesis.", "purpose and objectives": "This meta-analysis quantifies the effect of micro-sprinkler irrigation on water productivity (WP) and salinity mitigation in date palm systems for smallholders in the Draa Valley. It aims to provide a robust evidence base for irrigation policy and practice.", "methodology": "A systematic review identified relevant field studies. A rando

proposer: Fatima Zahra El Amrani, Karim Benali, Amina Toufik

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The document is dated 2026-04-25 (future date relative to training cutoff), marked as preprint/meta-analysis with incomplete methodology section (text truncated at 'A rando'), and the empirical claims about micro-sprinkler efficacy in this specific agro-ecological context remain unvalidated pending peer review and field validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 乾いた谷の中で、細い水の筋が古い洪水を癒し、塩を忘れさせる比率。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 細い光の糸が塩辛い地を穿ち、上へ上へと根を導く。
